headline: Enphase Energy entered into an agreement to sell $235 million in Section 45X tax credits for $218.55 million, prompting a downward revision to its Q1 2026 GAAP gross margin guidance.
investor_impact: The sale provides an immediate $218.55 million cash infusion, bolstering liquidity at a 7% discount to face value. While Q1 2026 GAAP gross margins will be negatively impacted by 6.7 percentage points due to the discount and fees, non-GAAP metrics remain unaffected, leaving the core operating thesis intact.
key_figures: $235,000,000 of advanced manufacturing production tax credits
6.7 percentage points reduction in Q1 2026 GAAP gross margin
